column2: # Plate-level parameters for curve_id = 1 are already in the draws
# Step 3: inject Student-t noise (df = 4), then invert
x_hat  <- C * ((D - A) / pmax(y_star - A, 1e-9) - 1)^(1 / B)
cat(sprintf("  Posterior mean:  %.4f  log10(AU/mL)\n", mean(log(x_hat) / log(10))))
cat(sprintf("  Posterior SD:    %.4f  log10(AU/mL)\n", sd(log(x_hat) / log(10))))
